# Souqly — سوقلي

> Souqly is Egypt's professional B2B marketplace connecting companies, factories, wholesalers, sales agents and buyers across the Arab world.

Souqly lets verified companies publish products, services, wholesale offers, real estate and lands, while buyers post RFQs and tenders. Sales agents earn commissions by referring deals.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Marketplace overview, featured companies, listings, RFQs and tenders.
- [About](/about): Souqly's mission and vision for Egyptian B2B trade.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): Five steps to start using Souqly.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Premium Company and Premium Agent plans.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about accounts, listings, verification and deals.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Souqly team.

## Marketplace

- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Browse all approved listings.
- [Companies](/companies): Directory of Egyptian companies.
- [Factories](/factories): Manufacturers and production partners.
- [Agents](/agents): Sales agents available for partnership.
- [Wholesale](/wholesale): Bulk B2B offers.
- [Real estate](/real-estate): Commercial and investment properties.
- [Lands](/lands): Land plots for sale or development.
- [RFQs](/rfq): Open buyer requests for quotation.
- [Tenders](/tenders): Public and private tenders.
- [Map](/map): Listings on the map.
- [Search](/search-all): Cross-vertical search.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Refund policy](/refund-policy): Subscription refund terms.
